parents.subject: LU-16434 tests: replace '-m' with '-i' in sanity/230j

commit.subject: LU-16314 osc: Migrate %p to %pK
commit.message:
LU-16314 osc: Migrate %p to %pK

Migrating to %pK which works in all the supported kernels.

A couple of passes of:

grep -rl '[^a-zA-Z%]%p[^a-zA-Z]' lustre/osc |
  xargs -i{} sed -i -E 's/([^a-zA-Z%])%p([^a-zA-Z])/\1%pK\2/g' {}

Also fixes white space around the affect code change

Test-Parameters: trivial
HPE-bug-id: LUS-10945
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: Ie01fa4a89c0ee94760ea03e9675e248fde4fa9e7
